narrative:
Pickerington City N (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,338 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
